title: Darcy Andrade - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Darcy Andrade - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All People
Darcy Andrade
Network Program Administrator
Education
Education
MEd in Higher Education Administration, Northeastern (ongoing)

Biography
Biography
Darcy Andrade is a network program administrator in the Khoury College of Computer Sciences at Northeastern University.
To keep the college’s programs running smoothly, Andrade assists Khoury faculty and staff across Northeastern’s global network with administrative and operational tasks. Previously, she worked as an academic advisor at the Roux Institute within Northeastern’s College of Professional Studies.
Before joining Northeastern, Andrade established herself as a seasoned professional in higher education with a focus on student recruitment, admissions, and advising. Most notably, she worked as a senior academic advisor for the Council on International Educational Exchange, supporting student programming across Europe and growing study abroad opportunities for minority students.
A Maine native and resident, Andrade can be found kayaking in the Gulf of Maine and skiing the East Coast. She also enjoys traveling, especially to her father's homeland in the Azores, Portugal.
